{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/14028469?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/gasbugs", "id": 14028469, "login": "gasbugs", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE0MDI4NDY5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/gasbugs", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44979", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-522", "name": "Insufficiently Protected Credentials"}], "description": "### Impact
When `@hapi/wreck` follows a 3xx redirect to a different hostname, only the `Authorization` and `Cookie` headers are stripped. The standard credential header `Proxy-Authorization` is forwarded intact to the redirect target, potentially exposing forward-proxy credentials to a host outside the original trust boundary.

Redirect following is opt-in. The redirects option defaults to false (no redirections followed), so applications are only affected if they have explicitly set redirects to a positive integer on the request or via `Wreck.defaults({ redirects: ... })`.

### Patches
`@hapi/wreck` 18.1.1 extends the cross-hostname strip set to include `proxy-authorization`. Upgrade to 18.1.1 or later.

### Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible:
- Leave redirects at its default (`false`) — applications that never enable redirect following are not affected.
- If redirects are required, set redirects: 0 when calling endpoints with sensitive headers, or strip Proxy-Authorization from the headers before issuing the request.
- Use the `beforeRedirect` hook to manually strip proxy-authorization (and any other sensitive application headers) when `redirectOptions` targets a different hostname than the original request.

### Resources
- Related: [CVE-2024-30260 / GHSA-3787-6prv-h9w3 ](https://github.com/nodejs/undici/security/advisories/GHSA-3787-6prv-h9w3)(undici)
- [RFC 7235 §4.4 — Proxy-Authorization](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7235#section-4.4)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0026, "percentile": 0.17553}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-27T00:38:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44979"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-27T00:38:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/hapijs/wreck/security/advisories/GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c", "https://github.com/nodejs/undici/security/advisories/GHSA-3787-6prv-h9w3", "https://github.com/hapijs/wreck/commit/a5b6fac9c684621c1d5733d10a0257697cfea373", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/hapijs/wreck/security-advisories/GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/hapijs/wreck", "summary": "@hapi/wreck leaks sensitive `Proxy-Authorization` header across cross-hostname redirects", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-27T00:38:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vhjm-w67q-g75c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "18.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@hapi/wreck"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 18.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @hapi/wreck leaks sensitive `Proxy-Authorization` header across cross-hostname redirects
